input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.12.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.12.4
            TITLE: all double lug joints, whether fitted parallel or perpendicular to the axis of the tube, must

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.12.4: All Double Lug Joints, whether fitted parallel or perpendicular to the axis of the tube, must
F.5.12.4 All Double Lug Joints, whether fitted parallel or perpendicular to the axis of the tube, must 
include a capping arrangement

final_answer: All Double Lug Joints, whether fitted parallel or perpendicular to the axis of the tube, must include a capping arrangement
